if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND s.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND s.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSave :: selectById */ s.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_st.code_label AS save_type_cd_nm FROM pm_save s LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = s.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SAVE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.save_type_cd WHERE s.save_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSave :: selectList */ s.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_st.code_label AS save_type_cd_nm FROM pm_save s LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = s.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SAVE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.save_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmSave :: selectPageList */ s.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , cd_st.code_label AS save_type_cd_nm FROM pm_save s LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = s.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = s.member_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_st ON cd_st.code_grp = 'SAVE_TYPE' AND cd_st.code_value = s.save_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(s.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmSave :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_save s
